title: Surgeon Vacancy at Baxter India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Baxter India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Baxter India International Enterprises in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Baxter India International Enterprises:
Baxter India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
